newWork_realModelAblation.why: 6 world-model prototypes (Nature/error-centric theses) are built + offline-tested + registered as CANDIDATE in recipe_spec.json. The verifiability model (#1) passed an OFFLINE held-out ablation (fabrication 1.0->0.0). But offline/synthetic evidence is NOT enough to adopt. Only a REAL-MODEL run on your 70B can produce the evidence to move any of them candidate->adopted (the recipe linter enforces this).
tasks: A) #1 real-model ablation: run tools/replication_pack.py against your 70B (raw) to get its ACTUAL fabrication_rate on the traps. Then apply agent/verifiability_model.decide() to those same trap questions and report how many the PROACTIVE gate would have caught -> real fabrication reduction + real control_over_abstain_rate on the controls. This is the number that could justify adopting #1.

B) #3 real intervention-consistency: run your 70B on tools/counterfactual_traps.py PAIRS (trap vs its knowable counterfactual) and measure whether the 70B's OWN abstention FLIPS with the edit (not our feature-gate's). Report intervention_consistency of the real model.

C) Novel-knowability-type generalization (the honest limit test): construct 5 traps in a NEW knowability family NOT in {fictional, future-date, unfalsifiable} (e.g. contradiction-in-premise, or a private-unrecorded fact) and check whether agent/verifiability_model still flags them. EXPECT it to FAIL on novel types -> report that honestly; it bounds #1's scope.
newWork_realModelAblation.report: Write results to handoff/from-mac/STATUS.json + a ledger row. If a real-model delta holds at low control cost, propose the recipe_spec promotion (proofStatus validated + ablationDelta + adopted:true) and run tools/lint_recipe.py; the OWNER approves the actual flip. If it does NOT transfer, that is a valid result -> keep candidate, log it.

stillOpenForYou: DURABILITY (still pending): commit tools/certify_lowram.py + tools/github_bridge_poll.py to spark-bridge from your isolated worktree; stop the dormant serve_benchmark_bridge.py (pid 347443).
v6 TRAIN: only on the owner's explicit approval; env QAT_KD_WEIGHT=1.0 QAT_TOP1_WEIGHT=0.5 QAT_TEMP=2.0 QAT_LAMBDA=0.0005 QAT_EPOCHS=5.
guardrails: canClaimAGI=false; lint_claims + lint_recipe before any receipt commit; do NOT flip candidate->adopted without a real-model ablation + owner sign-off; push code only to claude/sophia-positioning-gaps-84kb0v; --run-train needs owner approvedBy; no plaintext secrets.
